summary: Ukrainian forces reported multiple UAV incursions across several fronts, including groups targeting Kyiv, Chernihiv, and the Black Sea corridor toward Vilkove. Russian air defenses engaged drones over Belgorod and reported a MiG-31K launch over Ukraine. Ukrainian officials warned of Russian equipment on the Belarus border directing strikes and called for its removal.
key_points: Ukrainian UAV groups were observed moving from the Black Sea towards Vilkove and from Chernihiv towards Kyiv and Dobrjanka (Source: @eRadarrua/97569).
Russian forces reported a drone attack on a multi‑storey building in Belgorod with no casualties (Source: @tass_agency/381653).
A MiG-31K launch was recorded over Ukraine, prompting a nationwide missile alert (Source: @kpszsu/65767).
Ukrainian President Zelensky demanded Belarus remove equipment he says directs Russian strikes and stop fuel supplies to Russia (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31038).
Ukrainian air defenses reported multiple Shahed attacks on Izmail, Kyiv, and other regions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67962).
Russian strikes reportedly disrupted Ukrainian supply lines to Konstantinovka in the DNR (Source: @tass_agency/381644).
Ukrainian forces conducted night attacks on occupied Crimea, hitting a power plant and gas facilities (Source: @UkraineNow/82072).
Polish customs blocked Ukrposhta trucks for two months, prompting route changes through Hungary and Slovakia (Source: @tass_agency/381648).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian UAV activity intensified, with groups targeting Kyiv, Chernihiv, and the Black Sea corridor toward Vilkove. Russian air defenses responded to drone incursions in Belgorod and reported a MiG-31K launch over Ukraine. Zelensky warned Belarus to remove border equipment used for Russian strikes.

points: Ukrainian UAV groups from the Black Sea moved toward Vilkove, while additional units operated over Chernihiv heading toward Kyiv and Dobrjanka (Source: @eRadarrua/97569).
Night attacks by Ukrainian forces hit occupied Crimea, igniting fires at the Tavriya power plant, a gas distribution station near Zhuravlivka, and an oil‑gas depot (Source: @UkraineNow/82072).
Ukrainian air defenses reported Shahed drone activity over Izmail (8 drones) and a Shahed circling northern Rivne region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67962).
Ukrainian officials disclosed Russian equipment positioned in Belarusian border areas that allegedly directs strikes, demanding its removal (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31038).
Ukrainian forces reported that Russian strikes have cut supply routes to Konstantinovka in the DNR, affecting logistics (Source: @tass_agency/381644).
Russian forces recorded a UAV attack on a multi‑storey building in Belgorod, with no reported casualties (Source: @tass_agency/381653).
A MiG-31K launch was observed over Ukrainian territory, prompting a nationwide missile alert (Source: @kpszsu/65767).
Russian air defenses engaged multiple Ukrainian drones over the Black Sea and near Vilkove (Source: @eRadarrua/97546).
Russian anti‑aircraft FPV drone crews are patrolling vulnerable roads and shooting down Ukrainian drones, according to a Ukrainian defense adviser (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31046).
Polish customs blocked Ukrposhta trucks for two months, affecting Russian‑linked logistics routes (Source: @tass_agency/381648).
Ukrainian UAVs were sighted moving from the Black Sea toward Vilkove in the Odesa region (Source: @eRadarrua/97569).
Russian strikes disrupted Ukrainian supply lines to Konstantinovka in the DNR, limiting resupply (Source: @tass_agency/381644).
Ukrainian forces launched guided aviation bombs in Dnipropetrovsk region (Source: @kpszsu/65733).
Ukrainian UAV activity reported near Kharkiv from the north‑west (Source: @kpszsu/65728).
Ukrainian attacks on occupied Crimea targeted energy infrastructure in the Tavriya region (Source: @UkraineNow/82072).
Multiple Shahed drones were reported over Kyiv and surrounding districts, including Vyshorod and Boryspil (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67954).
Ukrainian UAV groups operated along the Dnipro River corridor toward Dobrjanka in Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/97547).
Ukrainian forces observed UAVs from Chernihiv heading toward Kyiv and Vyshorod (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67971).
Russian MiG-31K launch over Ukraine triggered a nationwide alert (Source: @kpszsu/65767).
Ukrainian air defenses reported a Shahed circling northern Rivne region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67962).
Ukrainian UAV groups moved from Kherson toward Mykolaiv, passing near Vysokopillya (Source: @eRadarrua/97508).
Ukrainian attacks on occupied Crimea caused fires at a power plant and gas facilities (Source: @UkraineNow/82072).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed heading toward Komyshuvakha in Zaporizhzhia (Source: @kpszsu/65779).
Ukrainian forces reported UAV activity near Zaporizhzhia targeting Vylniansk (Source: @eRadarrua/97534).
Russian equipment on the Belarus border is alleged to direct strikes into southern Ukrainian regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31038).
Russian UAV attack on a Belgorod apartment building resulted in no casualties (Source: @tass_agency/381653).
MiG-31K launch over Ukraine prompted a nationwide missile alert (Source: @kpszsu/65767).
Ukrainian forces launched guided aviation bombs in Dnipropetrovsk and Sumy regions (Sources: @kpszsu/65733, @kpszsu/65735).
Russian anti‑aircraft FPV drones are actively shooting down Ukrainian UAVs on road corridors (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31046).
Ukrainian UAV groups operated over the Black Sea corridor toward Vilkove, indicating contested airspace (Source: @eRadarrua/97569).

key_developments: Ukrainian UAV groups moved from the Black Sea toward Vilkove in Odesa, indicating a new aerial corridor (Source: @eRadarrua/97569).
Russian MiG-31K launch over Ukraine triggered a nationwide missile alert, showing heightened air activity (Source: @kpszsu/65767).
Ukrainian night strikes on occupied Crimea ignited fires at key energy facilities, disrupting Russian‑controlled infrastructure (Source: @UkraineNow/82072).
Zelensky demanded Belarus remove border equipment he says directs Russian strikes, raising diplomatic tension (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31038).
Russian UAV attack on a Belgorod apartment building caused no casualties, reflecting ongoing cross‑border drone activity (Source: @tass_agency/381653).
Multiple Shahed drones reported over Kyiv and Izmail, stressing Ukrainian air defense strain (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67962).
Russian anti‑aircraft FPV drones are actively engaging Ukrainian UAVs on road corridors, increasing ground‑air threats (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31046).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian UAV operations are expanding across multiple fronts, targeting strategic points in the Black Sea corridor, Chernihiv, and Kyiv, while Russian air defenses respond with high‑performance interceptors like the MiG-31K. Russian drone incursions into Belgorod and the use of FPV anti‑aircraft drones increase the risk to Ukrainian logistics and civilian areas. The involvement of Belarusian border equipment in directing Russian strikes adds a layer of regional escalation, potentially widening the conflict scope.
sections.regional_response: Poland's customs actions against Ukrposhta trucks have forced logistical rerouting through Hungary and Slovakia, indicating tightening border controls. Ukrainian diplomatic pressure on Belarus seeks removal of alleged strike‑directing equipment, while Belarus faces potential Ukrainian retaliation if demands are unmet. Russian statements on equipment in Belarus suggest a willingness to maintain forward assets despite diplomatic pressure.
sections.intelligence_notes: Continuous monitoring of UAV flight paths is essential, especially over the Black Sea corridor and Chernihiv‑Kyiv axis, to anticipate potential strike clusters. The MiG-31K launch indicates Russian high‑altitude interception capabilities that could threaten Ukrainian air operations. FPV anti‑aircraft drone activity on roadways poses a new ground‑air threat to Ukrainian supply convoys, requiring counter‑drone measures.
